name: George Fassett's Cheesecake Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Leave the cream cheese out to soften. Beat until smooth with sugar and vanilla. Add eggs, one at a time, beating on high. Fold in sour cream.
2. The batter will make more than what a 9-inch graham cracker crust will hold, so fill it to the brim. Then bake the remainder in custard cups. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and a toothpick comes out clean.
